findings.body: retainForReprocessing() keeps retained blocks/envelopes after startProcessing() clears successfulDownloads but discards the current attempt, so later peer-attributable failures can carry peers: [] and avoid scoring the original sender.

Peer-attributable EXECUTION_ENGINE_INVALID/PAYLOAD_ERROR_EXECUTION_ENGINE_INVALID attempts are stored in executionErrorAttempts but excluded from getFailedPeers(), so the same bad peer can be selected immediately again instead of being excluded from retry.
